mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_activity ( user_id, activity_id, image_url, activity_theme, activity_detail, activity_time, activity_type, location, points_obtained, click_count, signup_time, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{activityId}, #{imageUrl}, #{themeName}, #{description}, #{startTime}, #{type}, #{location}, 0, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
